cube_major_cycle_algorithm_envelope.description: CASA cube major-cycle envelope. For cube imaging this brackets CubeMajorCycleAlgorithm work including C++ tuneSelectData, nSubCubeFitInMemory, gridding/degridding, normalization, and subimage writeback that are not exposed as separate Python timers.
cube_major_cycle_algorithm_envelope.reason: no source timing fields found: make_psf, calcres_major_cycle, clean_major_cycle

deconvolution_minor_cycle.description: CASA minor-cycle, mask update, and convergence checks. For cube imaging minor_cycle brackets CubeMinorCycleAlgorithm.
deconvolution_minor_cycle.reason: no source timing fields found: minor_cycle, update_mask, has_converged

image_store_writeback_and_restore.description: CASA image-store writeback envelope: cube subimage writes occur inside major-cycle C++ calls, while final restored-image writes are included in restore_images.
image_store_writeback_and_restore.reason: no source timing fields found: clean_major_cycle, calcres_major_cycle, restore_images
